title: Percentage Increase Calculator - Calculate % Increase
description: Free percentage increase calculator. Calculate the percentage increase between two values or find the new value after a percentage increase.
keywords: percentage increase calculator, percent increase, percentage growth, calculate increase
intro: Calculate percentage increase between two numbers, or find the result after applying a percentage increase to a value.

faq.a: Percentage increase = ((New Value - Old Value) / Old Value) × 100. Example: from 50 to 75 = ((75-50)/50) × 100 = 50% increase.

faq.q: How to find a value after percentage increase?
faq.a: New Value = Original × (1 + Percentage/100). Example: 200 increased by 25% = 200 × 1.25 = 250.
